summary: Solid negative-result paper demonstrating CWD sufficiency through systematic experimentation. Budget equivalence theorem well-supported. Minor issues: single seed, pilot-only figures. Ready for venue submission with minor revisions.

issues.description: All experiments use single seed (42); needs multi-seed validation for camera-ready
Figures show 20-epoch pilot data; full 200-epoch training curves would strengthen visual evidence
CIFAR-100 asymmetry between conservative and aggressive variants not fully explained
